span.p:
T09 Update EXISTING L2 (7d)
+ functional test cases
A: IoT Product Owner

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T10 Execute functional test (3d)
runs BEFORE any software build
A: IoT Engineer (R/A)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T11 GATE 3
Functional test approval (3d)
gates the software build
A: CEO

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
T19 GATE
PRD Approval (3d)
A: CTO

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T20 Develop platform functions (7d)
A: SW Engineering

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
T21 GATE
SW QC approval, JIRA (3d)
A: SW Engineering

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T23 Run product final UAT (3d)
A: IoT Product Owner (R/A)

span.p:
T24 GATE 5
Final UAT vs L2 (3d)
A: CEO

span.p:
T39 Monthly Product Demo (3d)
PARALLEL - Commercial
A: IoT Product Owner (R/A)

qualitative in this lane
A: IoT Product Owner (R/A)

NO post-release review gate in this lane
and no L1, so no KPI baseline
